hero.subtitle: Drive measurable growth through targeted advertising on Meta and RedNote. We combine audience strategy, creative testing, and disciplined optimisation to help your brand win attention in the feed and turn that attention into leads, sales, and long-term customer growth.

details.title: What We Do & Why It Matters
details.card1Desc: Most brands spend on paid social without a clear testing structure, strong creative system, or platform-specific strategy. Budget gets wasted on weak hooks, broad audiences, and campaigns that generate reach without real business outcomes.
details.card2Desc: We plan, launch, and manage Meta Ads and RedNote Ads campaigns built around audience insight, creative direction, funnel structure, and conversion tracking. From prospecting and retargeting to lead generation and ecommerce growth, we shape paid social systems that are built to scale.
details.card3Desc: Stronger campaign efficiency, clearer creative learnings, and more reliable growth from paid social. You get better visibility into what drives attention, clicks, leads, and purchases across the platforms your audience actually uses.

subFeatures.title: Our Paid Social
subFeatures.item1Desc: Drive measurable results on Facebook and Instagram with targeted ad management. We combine technical precision with creative excellence to optimise your budget and deliver scalable growth, ensuring your brand stands out in the feed while maximising your return on investment.
subFeatures.item2Desc: Expand your reach among the Chinese audience community with our expertise as an official advertising partner. We create native content strategies that resonate with high value users on Rednote, blending visual storytelling with precise targeting to build authentic trust and drive scalable growth for your brand.

caseStudy.title: Real Results for Real Businesses
caseStudy.case1Problem: The brand was spending consistently on Meta but creative fatigue set in quickly, customer acquisition costs were climbing, and retargeting was too weak to recover lost demand at scale.
caseStudy.case2Problem: The business had strong organic content but no structured paid system to scale reach or conversions. RedNote interest was growing, but there was no clear path from attention to attributable sales or enquiries.
